title: Prefix Sum
commonMistake: Forgetting the zero prefix for ranges starting at index 0.

title: Two Pointers
commonMistake: Moving the wrong pointer without proving monotonicity.

title: Sliding Window
commonMistake: Not shrinking until the invariant is restored.

title: Binary Search On Answer
commonMistake: Choosing bounds that do not include the answer.

title: Knapsack DP
